name: salesforce
description: Work with Salesforce records through the canonical Salesforce connector, including account briefs, pipeline review, metadata discovery, SOQL queries, SOSL search, approved automation, and explicit record writes.

interface.shortDescription: Query, search, read, and safely update Salesforce records
interface.longDescription: Use Salesforce to discover object metadata, build account and opportunity briefs, review pipeline and forecast risk, run provider-native SOQL and SOSL requests, invoke approved custom automation, read records, and perform explicit record writes through the canonical Salesforce connector.
defaultPrompt: Find records, build account briefs, review pipeline, run SOQL or SOSL, and update records only when requested
